overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic corporate aircraft hangar in a video game, featuring illuminated AV displays, sleek metallic corridors, and Arasaka branding. The player walks through the facility transitioning from the main showroom floor to narrow service corridors and an upper overlook with city views.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic aircraft showroom with illuminated display platforms

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the hangar approaching the aircraft displays on the left

entered.detail: illuminated white rectangular platform displaying a futuristic AV
sleek black and white aircraft with Arasaka styling on display
glowing holographic display panel showing aircraft specifications
large white glowing tiles marking the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a vast, dimly lit corporate hangar with polished marble floors. The camera approaches illuminated display platforms showcasing futuristic aircraft, with digital interface screens visible on the left. The environment features high ceilings with recessed lighting and a cold, metallic aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service corridor with glass display cases

events.description: turns right from the open hangar into a narrow enclosed corridor with display cases

agents.ego_description: turning into the side corridor and walking past illuminated glass display cases on the right

entered.detail: illuminated shelves displaying merchandise or equipment behind glass
dark metallic wall with cable conduits running vertically
brightly lit vending machine with colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right from the main hangar into a narrow service corridor. Glass display cases line the right wall while the left side features dark metallic bulkheads. The corridor leads toward an illuminated vending machine at the far end, transitioning from the open showroom to a more confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with vending machines leading to numbered stairwell door

events.description: passes through glass door marked with number 3 into the stairwell area

agents.ego_description: walking down the corridor and passing through the numbered security door into the upper level

entered.detail: glass security door with large white number 3 and green status light
black equipment crates with white Arasaka corporate branding
metal handrail along the stairwell entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the narrow corridor, the camera approaches a glass door marked with the number 3. Arasaka-branded storage containers line the left wall. The segment ends as the camera passes through the doorway into a stairwell area with metal railings visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper overlook with city view windows returning to hangar

events.description: exits the stairwell through a doorway back into the main hangar upper level

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper catwalk overlooking the hangar and the city lights visible through windows

entered.detail: large windows revealing nighttime cityscape with distant lights
elevated walkway with metal railings overlooking the hangar floor
view of the displayed aircraft from the upper overlook perspective

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals an upper overlook with large windows showing the night cityscape outside. The camera walks along a metal catwalk, providing an aerial view of the aircraft displays below. The space transitions from enclosed corridor to semi-open overlook before returning to the main hangar area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, cold corporate showroom into confined service areas before opening up to an elevated city overlook. It begins by gliding across polished marble floors toward illuminated aircraft displays and digital interface screens under high, recessed ceilings. As the camera turns right, the open hangar shifts into a narrow service corridor lined with glass display cases and dark metallic bulkheads, leading toward a glowing vending machine. The path continues past Arasaka-branded storage containers and through a numbered glass door, moving from the tight hallway into a metal stairwell. Finally, the scene expands onto a metal catwalk with large windows that reveal a sprawling night cityscape, providing an aerial perspective of the hangar floor below.
